hierarchy.evidence: secondary insults such as intracranial hypertension
provenance: The BrainIT group concept and core dataset definition::chunk-11

hierarchy.evidence: Physiotherapy
Arterial Pressors
Jugular Venous Desaturation
Cerebral Perfusion Pressure (CPP)
Intracranial Pressure (ICP)
Schema-inferred: Systemic Hypotension is a subclass of Secondary Insult.
hierarchy.justification: Systemic hypotension is a type of secondary insult.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome is a subclass of Secondary Insult.
hierarchy.justification: Acute respiratory distress syndrome is a form of secondary insult.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Arterial Hypotension is a subclass of Systemic Hypotension.
hierarchy.justification: Arterial hypotension is a specific case of systemic hypotension.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Secondary Insult Treatment is a subclass of Secondary Insult Therapy.
hierarchy.justification: Secondary insult treatment is a form of secondary insult therapy.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: CVP is a subclass of Optional Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: CVP is an optional monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Microdialysis is a subclass of Optional Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: Microdialysis is an optional monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Brain Temperature is a subclass of Optional Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: Brain temperature is an optional monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Temperature is a subclass of Core Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: Temperature is a core monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: SaO2 is a subclass of Core Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: SaO2 is a core monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP) is a subclass of Core Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: Mean arterial pressure is a core monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Respiration Rate is a subclass of Core Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: Respiration rate is a core monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Heart Rate is a subclass of Core Monitoring Parameter.
hierarchy.justification: Heart rate is a core monitoring parameter.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: GCS Assessment is a subclass of Clinical Assessment.
hierarchy.justification: GCS assessment is a clinical assessment.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: CT Scan Assessment is a subclass of Clinical Assessment.
hierarchy.justification: CT scan assessment is a clinical assessment.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Pupil Assessment is a subclass of Clinical Assessment.
hierarchy.justification: Pupil assessment is a clinical assessment.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Biochemistry is a subclass of Laboratory Values.
hierarchy.justification: Biochemistry is a laboratory value.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Haematology is a subclass of Laboratory Values.
hierarchy.justification: Haematology is a laboratory value.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: White Blood Cell Count is a subclass of Haematology.
hierarchy.justification: White blood cell count is a part of haematology.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Patient Transport is a subclass of Nursing Intervention.
hierarchy.justification: Patient transport is a nursing intervention.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Routine Nursing Care is a subclass of Nursing Intervention.
hierarchy.justification: Routine nursing care is a nursing intervention.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Bedside Intervention is a subclass of Nursing Intervention.
hierarchy.justification: Bedside intervention is a nursing intervention.

hierarchy.evidence: Schema-inferred: Hypotension is a subclass of Condition.
Schema-inferred: Sedation is a subclass of Baseline Therapy.

Schema-inferred: Noradrenaline is a subclass of Vasopressors.

Schema-inferred: Adrenaline is a subclass of Vasopressors.
Schema-inferred: Secondary Insult is a subclass of Condition.
Schema-inferred: Hypertension is a subclass of Condition.
